## Summary
A concise description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation
If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any other information, references, or examples.
